name: Freight Bridge LLC — Iowa City Data Center Services
tagline: Post-Construction Cleanup & Removal for Data Center Projects
slogan: We haul it out so you can move on to the next build
description: Freight Bridge LLC provides professional post-construction cleanup, debris removal, and decommissioned equipment hauling for data center construction projects in the Iowa City corridor. Owner-operated with hands-on supervision of every load.

hours.displayText: Mon-Fri 6AM-6PM | Sat by appointment | Sun Closed

paymentAccepted: Credit Card, Wire Transfer, ACH, Invoice (Net 30)

brand.logoAlt: Freight Bridge LLC Iowa City Logo
